zh.Blickling, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可布利可林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Boleyn於1489年出生在英國諾福爾可布利可林時，她的父親Sir William Boleyn38歲，母親Lady Margaret Butler35歲。她於1507年與John Sackville在英國素可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1550年在英國素可維提哈姆享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Boleyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullen  .
Flemish: derivative of the personal name Bol, from Baldwin .

variants.name: Bullen
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the French Channel port of Boulogne, recorded in Latin sources both as Gessoriacum and as Bononia. The latter name is clearly the source of the modern placename. It is ostensibly a derivative of Latin bonus ‘good’ (compare Bolognese ), but may in fact come from a Gaulish element bona ‘foundation’. Boulogne has long been a major trading port between England and France.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Boleyn was born in 1489, in Blickling, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir William Boleyn, was 38 and her mother, Lady Margaret Butler, was 35. She married John Sackville in 1507, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1550, in Withyham, Sussex, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Boleyn est née en 1489, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Boleyn, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Butler, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John Sackville en 1507, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1550, à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Boleyn 1489 in Blickling, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Boleyn 38 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Butler 35. Sie hat 1507 in Sussex, England John Sackville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1550 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Withyham, Sussex, England und wurde in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치 노위치 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Boleyn(이)가 1489년 영국 노르폴크 블릭링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Boleyn(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Butler(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1507년 영국 수세스에서 John Sackville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 수세스 위스이함에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치 노위치 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Sackville em 1507, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1550, em Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: норвич кэтедраль, норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Boleyn родилась в 1489 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Boleyn было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Butler, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Sackville в 1507 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1550 г. в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности норвич кэтедраль, норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
